uplink.description: battery + temperature + humidity + NH3 + H2S (TTN example bytes; normalized expected authored here)
uplink._note: Byte sequence is the upstream TTN example input; expected.data authored against the normalized vocabulary (battery%->batteryPercent extra, temp/humidity->air.*, NH3/H2S concentrations->air.nh3/air.h2s camelCase extras). Raw values confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js: battery=100, temperature=28.4, humidity=50, nh3=0, h2s=0.01.

uplink.description: negative temperature + battery + humidity + v1.2 H2S channel (0x06/0x7d, /1000)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds. Exercises two's-complement negative temperature (0xFFD2=-46 -> -4.6 C) and the v1.2 H2S channel scaling /1000 (0x03E8=1000 -> 1 ppm). Raw values confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js: battery=80, temperature=-4.6, humidity=45, h2s=1.

uplink.description: temperature + humidity + both gas sensor-status sentinels (polarizing / device error)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds. Exercises the NH3 (0xfffe -> polarizing) and H2S (0xffff -> device error) sentinel decode, emitted as air.nh3SensorStatus / air.h2sSensorStatus camelCase extras. Raw values confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js: temperature=20, humidity=40, nh3_sensor_status=polarizing, h2s_sensor_status=device error.

uplink.description: diagnostic channels (IPSO version, device status) + battery + temperature + humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds. Exercises the 0xff IPSO-version (0x10 -> v1.0) and device-status (always on) channels, emitted as camelCase diagnostic extras. Raw values confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js: ipso_version=v1.0, device_status=on, battery=55, temperature=23.6, humidity=55.
Synthetic error vector: a zero-length payload is rejected before any channel parsing.
Synthetic error vector: channel 0x99/0x99 is not a GS301 TLV, so no channel is recognized.
